name: Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Daniel Bohannon (@Mandiant/@FireEye), oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects all variations of obfuscated powershell IEX invocation code generated by Invoke-Obfuscation framework from the code block linked in the references

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4697 AND ("Service Filename" MATCHES '\$PSHome\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$PSHome\[' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$ShellId\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$ShellId\[' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$env:Public\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$env:Public\[' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$env:ComSpec\[(\s*\d{1,3}\s*,){2}' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\\*mdr\*\W\s*\)\.Name' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$VerbosePreference\.ToString\(' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\String\]\s*\$VerbosePreference')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4697 AND ("Service Filename" MATCHES '\$PSHome\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$PSHome\[' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$ShellId\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$ShellId\[' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$env:Public\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$env:Public\[' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$env:ComSpec\[(\s*\d{1,3}\s*,){2}' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\\*mdr\*\W\s*\)\.Name' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\$VerbosePreference\.ToString\(' OR "Service Filename" MATCHES '\String\]\s*\$VerbosePreference')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation - Security
